parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OPENROUTER_TEXT_MODEL || 'anthropic/claude-3.5-haiku', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }], temperature: 0.85, response_format: { type: 'json_object' } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={"error": true, "detail": "Content generation failed. Please try again.", "client_id": "{{ $json.client_id }}"}
